Types

Expr = ref object
  case kind*: ExprKind
  of ekNum:
    num*: int
  of ekStep:
    stepExpr*: Expr
    step*: int
  of ekRange:
    rangeSlice*: Slice[int]
  of ekSeq:
    exprs*: seq[Expr]
  of ekIndex:
    indexer*: int
    index*: int
  of ekNearest:
  of ekLastN:
    last*: int
  else:
    nil
ExprKind = enum
  ekAll, ekAny, ekLast, ekLastN, ekHash, ekNum, ekStep, ekRange, ekSeq, ekIndex,
  ekNearest

Procs

proc `$`(expr: Expr): string {....raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect],
                               forbids: [].}

    forbids: [].}
